prompt:

1. Include the word "forest" exactly 2 times.
2. Write exactly 3 sentences.
3. Do not use the word "copper".
4. Do not use any word longer than 8 letters.

Output ONLY the text itself — no preamble, no quotes, no title, no explanation.
